CSBIT_11_0.description: Branch address (when SCOND=0). The effective 13-bit branch address is (CSBIT20 << 12) | CSBIT_11_0.

TSEL.description: Test Selector - selects which condition to test (only when SCOND=1)

F_SEQ.description: False-path sequence control (F,JMP / F,NEXT / F,RETURN). Only when SCOND=1.

F_STK.description: False-path stack operation (F,HOLD / F,POP / F,LOAD / F,PUSH). Only when SCOND=1.

CSBIT20.description: Address Extension Bit - high bit (bit 12) of the 13-bit branch address

CSDELAY_BIT21.description: Delay control bit (timing-related; ignored for logical comparisons)
CSDELAY_BIT21.notes: Part of the delay/timing control, see microcode.h and ND110MicroCode/Program.cs

LOOP.description: LCOUNT - Count loop counter; if result false, return and hold

CONDENABL.description: Enable conditional sequencing. When set, use FALSE-path specs if condition is false.

SCOND.description: Set Condition - when set, the lower 12 bits encode condition tests (LCC/TSEL/F_SEQ/F_STK) instead of a branch address.

CSDELAY_BITS_27_26.description: Delay control bits (timing-related; ignored for logical comparisons)

T_STK.description: True-path stack operation (T,HOLD / T,POP / T,LOAD / T,PUSH)

T_SEQ.description: True-path sequence control (T,JMP / T,RETURN / T,NEXT / T,JMP0-3)

COMM.description: Command field - selects a 5-bit command code

IDBS.description: Internal Data Bus Source - selects what drives the IDB

MIS.description: MISO field - shift mode when ALUM=MIC (ROT/ZIN/LIN)

ALUSRC_STS.description: ALU Mode Control / Status update (STS,LO / STS,EA / STS,ES)

ALUI.description:
ALU Function Select. This 9-bit field encodes the composite ALU operation
(source operand selector + function + carry-in combination). It is decoded
as a single ALUF,xxx token (see tokens/nd110-tokens.yaml for all ALUF,xxx
entries and their w4 encodings).
ALUI.notes:
For ND-110, only bits 55-63 of the 64-bit canonical form map here.
In the 48-bit ND-110 word, this field occupies the upper 9 bits.

line_1.name: Registers and ALU
line_1.description: A/B register operands, ALU function and destination

line_2.name: Bus and Sequencing
line_2.description: Internal data bus, commands, true-path sequencing

line_3.name: Branch and Condition
line_3.description: Branch target OR condition test and false-path sequencing

ALUI.description: ALU Function Select (full 9 bits on ND-120)

rom_bit_flip.description: ND-120 EPROM images have bits 22-27 inverted vs the assembled form
rom_bit_flip.purpose:
When reading raw EPROM contents (e.g. from 45132L.bin + 45133L.bin),
XOR with this mask to obtain the canonical assembled form used by the
assembler and disassembler. When writing ROMs, apply the same XOR in
reverse.
